subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath arisen to reform the world, holding fast unto the Lamp whereby earth and heaven were illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبذا من قام علی اصلاح العالم متمسکا بمصباح به اشرقت الارض و السماء و الصلوه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Hands of the Cause, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
